notes: The repository connection supports SqlAuth or WindowsAuth.
Source SQL Servers support SqlAuth, WindowsAuth, AzureADPassword, and AzureADIntegrated.
WindowsAuth and AzureADIntegrated use the Windows identity running the collector process; they do not read usernames or passwords from SOURCE_SQL_CREDENTIALS_JSON.
Add active source servers to dbo.ServerInventory before running Collect-CapacityMetrics.ps1.
Do not copy this file to config.json with real passwords in source control.
